item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Been I while since I saw the Three cresent symbol, at least a few hundred skips back… Or closer, gah reading all these skips in order is only slightly less detrimental to my mind than randomly…

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
'And we have no idea what the fuck we're doing.'

Never a good thing to hear.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This was fun :3

+ minor thing
- minor thing

"UNDER NO CIRCUMSTANCES IS YOUR PRESENCE TO BE BROUGHT THE ATTENTION OF THE STRIDERS OR ANY PARTIES ASSOCIATED WITH THE BOGAL MOUNTAIN PREFECTURE."

I believe there should be a "TO" between "BROUGHT" and "THE" but I didn't want to edit this in case it was a stylistic choice.

item.title: Staff Post - Open
item.content:encoded: The images used in this article are cc-compliant with the SCP wiki's license (CC BY-SA 3.0) as it's an edited variant of this image, which is released under Public Domain.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This will always be one of my favorite articles on this site, I just love everything about it

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
ok. that last addendum is the reason for my upvote, besides the whole fact that it explains the 3-moon GoI and the link to Corbenic. This thing's practically a canon at this point.

Also, they've got brutal honesty

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: If anyone is wondering, the others are Fuckworms, The Town That Got Fucked By Bears, This Fucking Guy Did All The Murders, All Those Fucking Ideas, and "It's just fucking golf!"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I always love these SCPs that slowly unveil their true nature over various iterations. Great work! +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Isn't it a Foundation program?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
When will Corbenic become an official GOI or something similar

Also this is my personal favorite of the Corbenic scips. If I could +1 twice I would

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: SCP-2578. The three crescent.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I have no clue what even happen and I like it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I need so much more Corbenic in my life.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
+1

Love me some Corbenic, and the pantheon you've created there. Really like how this article fleshed out that world while staying short and sweet.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: If I recall, it's on SCP-3922 which is the censorship software with a bunch of dudes in Gas Masks and tactical armor that appear in media and take out criminals.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I swear there is another SCP that says that, but I don't know which one…

item.title: Re: Images
item.content:encoded: The sky image was a royalty/atrribution-free stock image that borrowed from pixabay. I altered it to be more Corbenic-like and added the moons.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I love this! :D

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I think some people who don't know what they're talking about might compare this to 2998. Honestly, I think it might be more interesting than that article.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
+1

"YOU ARE WATCHED • YOU ARE PROTECTED • YOU ARE LOVED".

At some point, someone saw this, and it inspired the idea that Santa lives here.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
That was a riveting read, even without having read most of the Corbenic skips. The chain of apocalypses occurring and the weirdness that goes along with it is just a lot of fun.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Man, no matter what iteration of the foundation it is they always overreact to Corbenic.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Oh. It WAS 'have been painted', then.

001: not clear.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I think this, like TL333s said, uses little bits of other skips but does it in a way that is not too obvious.

I'll have to read it again because I think I’m missing somthing…

E: i get it..

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Postmortem-Vector-44 "Corbenic".

+1 all the way!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I'll just go ahead and say that the SCP-001 in question is, insofar as we know, exclusive to that iteration of Earth. If it's in our universe, it hasn't yet been documented.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Huh. I see a lot of callbacks to other skips, and while I'm not sure how it all links together, this is pretty darn fun. At the very least, the story progression is logical, and it all comes together in that final note.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Okay. I have to ask.

In addition, two black crescent moon symbols have painted on the side of SCP-3319, over an inscription reading "YOU ARE WATCHED • YOU ARE PROTECTED • YOU ARE LOVED".

Do you mean 'symbols are painted'? Or 'symbols have been painted'? If not, what have these symbols painted over the inscription?
Since reading, I oscillate between 'Naaah, just a silly typo' and 'BUT WHAT IF IT WAS IMPORTANT FOR THE STORY?????? HUH???? HUH????'
Please help!!!!!

I don't dislike this, but I don't like it much either, I must say. It's a little of too much (= e.g., too many iterations IMO, that end up confusing the reader as to what is really going on) and a little of too little (sorry) (= e.g., if people disappear within 500 m of the thing, wouldn't the Foundation try to find out more about where and how? This whole description doesn't really feel like the, um, scientifically stubborn Foundation!).
But it might just be me…!

ETA shit, forgot! Also, you keep referring to an SCP-001. Which one? Existing? Still on the drawing board? ;> => the whole story and world-building feel incomplete.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is my jam.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Fun fact: "Clusterfuckocalypse" makes this only the fifth surviving mainlist skip to have the word "Fuck" in the title.

One thing, though:

After SCP-001's flooding of the Arctic Circle on 7/18/2560, SCP-3319 has caused no discernable of approaching flood waters

Think you're missing a word there.

item.title: Re: Just FYI
item.content:encoded:
Nice touch.

Though….I hate SCPs set in the future on principle. Feels like a cop-out almost.

This one….is very endearing, actually.

On a more thorough reading, I love this SCP. I am very annoyed at all the world ending SCPs out there, so this one, the idea of something that will save Earth in such an event, but isn't yet present….I love it!

item.title: Just FYI
item.content:encoded:
"Kušum" is Sumerian for "to abandon."

Also, the Sanskrit word "Jalakara" means weaver, and the Witch-Queen of Bogal Mountain's name refers to the greek goddess Hecate.
